text:
Scairt (スカルト, Sukaruto) is a Hunter and Royal Bodyguard for 7 th Prince Luzurus. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Scairt has an oblong-shaped head, with protruding cheeks and ears, squinty eyes, and a funnel nose. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 362 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

After Kurapika's announcement through the emergency channel revealing the existence of Nen beasts on the first day of the voyage, 7 th Prince Luzurus returns to Room 1007 and summons his hired Hunters Scairt, Ridge, and Basho to learn more about his Guardian Spirit Beast and Nen. The Hunters explain that Luzurus has a Guardian Spirit behind him, and although it is on his side, he cannot directly command it. Scairt answers Luzurus' question on how long it takes to learn Nen, telling him that it takes about a year to be able to see it. Hearing this dissuades Luzurus from learning Nen, and he informs them to follow the original plan of targeting 5 th Prince Tubeppa first. Luzurus orders the Hunters to guard him in rotations and report everything to him if they see another Nen beast. 

At 10:00 a.m. on the ninth day of the voyage, 1 st Prince Benjamin's soldier Kanjidol, assigned to guard Luzurus, ponders the suicide of Shikaku, a fellow soldier of Benjamin. Kanjidol concludes that it was a plot concocted by 9 th Prince Halkenburg to create a diversion so that two personal soldiers of his mother 2 nd Queen Duazul, Gadeau and Odessa, could have time to do something to Macne, possibly manipulating him into becoming an assassin, a theory corroborated by the fact that Macne was assigned to guard Luzurus later that afternoon. Kanjidol dissuades himself from reading too much into it as it is unlikely that Gadeau and Odessa can do anything to Macne without waking Scairt up since all four are in the breakroom at the time. 

Kanjidol later discloses his theory to Basho, who agrees with him and mentions his idea to have Scairt and Macne be placed under surveillance for the sake of conspicuity. Basho also tells Kanjidol that he had suggested the theory to Luzurus, who had disagreed because of his impression that Duazul did not help any of her children. 

On the eleventh day of the voyage, 11 th Prince Fugetsu is escorted throughout Tier 1 to deliver a letter from her recently-deceased sister 10 th Prince Kacho to several of her fellow Princes on Tier 1, including 7 th Prince Luzurus. As they leave Room 1007, Basho passes a good luck charm to Fugetsu before walking towards Scairt. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 402 

Abilities & Powers

Scairt has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter. 

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, Scairt is capable of using Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60
